seo_data.generated_keywords: Ariete, Steam Iron, 2000W, 6234, non-stick plate, auto-clean, vertical steam, ergonomic handle, everyday use, compact, blue iron, dry steam, steam shot, 250ml tank, 2mt cable
seo_data.meta_title: Ariete Steam Iron 2000W 6234 - Efficient Everyday Ironing
seo_data.meta_description: Experience effortless daily ironing with the Ariete 6234 Steam Iron. Boasting 2000W power, a non-stick Teflon plate, auto-clean function, and ergonomic design for superior results.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The Ariete Steam Iron 6234 is engineered for extreme ease of use and efficient ironing, making it an ideal choice for everyday household tasks. Its lightweight and reduced size, combined with an ergonomic soft-touch handle and horizontal filling, ensure comfortable operation. The iron delivers dry and well-distributed steam, complemented by a powerful 140gr/min steam shot and a continuous steam emission of 28gr/min, ensuring effective wrinkle removal on various fabrics.

Key features of the 6234 model include a durable non-stick Teflon plate measuring 21.5x11.5 cm, an auto-cleaning system for easy maintenance, and a convenient 250ml water tank capacity. It also offers versatile dry/steam functionality, vertical steam capability for hanging garments, and precise steam adjustment. The intense blue color adds a touch of brilliance to its compact and functional design, further enhanced by a spray function for dampening fabrics and an anti-drip system.

range_overview:
The Ariete Steam Iron 6234 is meticulously designed to offer an exceptional balance of performance and user-friendliness, making it a perfect appliance for daily ironing needs. Its compact and lightweight construction, coupled with an ergonomic soft-touch handle, ensures comfortable handling and reduced fatigue during extended ironing sessions. The innovative horizontal filling system further enhances convenience, streamlining the preparation process.

Equipped with a robust 2000W power output, the 6234 delivers efficient and effective ironing results. It features a high-quality non-stick Teflon plate (21.5x11.5 cm) that glides smoothly over fabrics, preventing snags and ensuring even heat distribution. The iron offers versatile dry and steam functions, including a powerful 140gr/min steam shot for stubborn creases and a consistent 28gr/min steam emission. Additional functionalities like vertical steam for delicate garments, adjustable steam settings, a spray function for dampening, and an anti-drip system underscore its comprehensive design for superior garment care. The integrated auto-clean system simplifies maintenance, prolonging the iron's lifespan and ensuring optimal performance.
sales_arguments: Lightweight and reduced size with an ergonomic soft-touch handle for extreme ease of use and comfortable daily ironing.
Powerful 2000W motor combined with a non-stick Teflon plate (21.5x11.5 cm) ensures efficient and smooth gliding over fabrics.
Features a robust 140gr/min steam shot and 28gr/min continuous steam emission for effective wrinkle removal.
Equipped with an auto-clean system, anti-drip function, and vertical steam capability for comprehensive garment care and easy maintenance.
Convenient 250ml tank capacity and 2mt cable length provide ample reach and reduce the need for frequent refills.
